chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-655 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on office objection (S) 2. For hearing of main case 14.10.2025 Mr.Hameedullah Dahri, Advocate for applicant Ms.Safa Hisbani, Assistant Prosecutor General a/w ASI Riaz Ali Solangi, PS Sehwan ********** Learned counsel for the applicant submits that he does not press the instant bail application if directions are issued to the trial Court to conclude the trial within one month. The learned A.P.G does not oppose the proposal. On request of the learned, learned counsel for the applicant, the instant bail application is dismissed as not pressed, with directions to the trial Court to proceed with the trial expeditiously and conclude the same without undue delay, preferably within a period of two months, from the date of this order. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
